rationale: Educ. Code §7.113 establishes an employer recognition award program and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board shall create the Employers for Education Excellence Award to honor employers that implement a policy to encourage and support employees who actively participate in activities of schools.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
